input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.7.2
            TITLE: the cost addendum must be submitted during onsite registration at the event.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.7.2: The Cost Addendum must be submitted during Onsite Registration at the Event.
S.3.7.2 The Cost Addendum must be submitted during Onsite Registration at the Event.

final_answer: The Cost Addendum must be submitted during Onsite Registration at the Event.
